species: the recently described propane-oxidizing “Candidatus Alkanivorans nitratireducens” was also responsible for nitrate-dependent anaerobic oxidation...
cell_type: Two anaerobic bioreactors seeded with activated sludge and anaerobic digestion sludge...
sample_source: activated sludge (50 ml) and anaerobic digestion sludge (100 ml) from a full-scale wastewater treatment plant...
